plan.failureSummary: The test failed during a deterministic (cached) run while attempting to click a 'close' button (×) that was not present on the page. This is a stale cache scenario where the previous run encountered a modal or banner that no longer exists.
observedIndicators: Instruction was to click 'Resources', but tool attempted to click '×' button
Failure screenshot does not show the '×' button or any modal/banner
Pass rate is 50%, suggesting environmental or cache volatility

remediationSteps.summary: Clear AI cache and retry test
remediationSteps.details: Clear the page.ai cache for this test and re-run. This will force the autonomous agent to re-scan the page and generate fresh instructions that ignore the missing close button.

remediationSteps.summary: Add explicit handling for intermittent UI elements if retry fails
remediationSteps.details: If the '×' button belongs to a cookie banner that is inconsistent, consider adding a global handler or updating the AI instruction to 'Handle any popups then go to developer docs'.

plan.notes: The failure screenshot shows the Checkly homepage without any visible modals or cookie banners. However, the tool call logs show the automation attempted to click './/button[normalize-space(.)="×"]'. This indicates the cached sequence of actions contains a step for an element that has since been removed or is no longer appearing, causing the deterministic playback to fail.
